はー……緊張するであります。お客様のお相手をさせてもらうのは、<br>あの特訓の:
*sigh*... I am nervous. This is my first time serving a customer since
that special training day...
大丈夫よ。あなた、司令官さんのお気に入りなんでしょ？<br>あの人に見込まれた娼:
Don't worry. You're the Commander's favorite, right? All the
courtesans he takes under his wing become top-earners. Hold your head high.
司令官殿の……。そうですよねっ！ 信じてくれた司令官殿のためにも、<br>わたし:
Commander... That's right! For the Commander who believed in me, I
will work hard and become a top-earner!
ベティさん、出番よ。常連のお客様だから、色々教えてもらうといいわ。:
Betty, it's your turn. He's a regular customer, so you should learn as
much as you can from him.
はいっ！ あの特訓の成果を発揮して、お客様に<br>満足してもらえるように頑張る:
Yes! I'll demonstrate the results of that special training and make
sure the customer is satisfied!
ふふっ。やっぱりあなた、いい根性しているわね。<br>司令官君のお気に入りなだけ:
Fufu. You really do have good spirit. Just as you'd expect from the
Commander's favorite. Now, off you go.
